summary: Completed testing of Grade 5 Scholarship Examination Platform. Frontend UI loads correctly with proper design and multi-language support, but backend API connectivity fails due to external URL routing issues.

critical_bugs.impact: Completely blocks all frontend-backend integration and user functionality
critical_bugs.details: Internal localhost:8001 works fine (returns 200), but external URL routing is not configured properly

critical_bugs.issue: Login fails with 404 error when frontend tries to authenticate users
critical_bugs.impact: No users can log in - students, teachers, parents, admins all affected

configuration_issues.issue: Kubernetes ingress or proxy not routing /api/* requests to backend service
configuration_issues.symptoms: Frontend shows 'Wake up servers' but servers are actually running internally

integration_issues.issue: Frontend cannot connect to backend API for login/authentication
integration_issues.details: Frontend .env points to external URL that returns 404

design_issues.issue: Login form elements don't have data-testid attributes as referenced in code

passed_tests: Frontend loads successfully on both localhost and external URL
Grade 5 Scholarship Exam Portal UI renders correctly
Login form displays with proper styling and branding
Language switcher (English) visible in top right corner
Academic branding and professional design implemented
Form input functionality works (can type in fields)
Backend server runs successfully on internal port 8001
Backend API responds correctly on localhost:8001 (health check returns 200)
Sample user data is seeded in database (student, teacher, parent, admin accounts)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix external URL routing configuration. The backend server is running correctly on localhost:8001 but the external URL https://app-install-hub-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/* returns 404. Need to configure Kubernetes ingress/proxy to route /api/* requests to the backend service on port 8001. This is preventing all user functionality including login for students, teachers, parents, and admins.
